name: BW16 Deauther (RTL8720DN)
description: Realtek RTL8720DN / BW16 (AmebaD) dual-band 2.4/5 GHz WiFi + BLE. Flashed via Realtek's AmebaD ImageTool over UART (NOT esptool/ltchiptool); the board auto-enters download mode via DTR/RTS. Ships the Vampire Deauther firmware (AT+ serial CLI: AT+SCAN / AT+DEAUTHIDX / AT+BEACONRANDOM / AT+STOP).

firmware_urls.note: AmebaD 3-file bundle (km0_boot_all / km4_boot_all / km0_km4_image2) + imgtool_flashloader_amebad.bin, fetched by flash_core.RtlAmeba8720Profile

note: Needs Realtek's upload_image_tool on the host (set CYBERC_AMEBAD_TOOL or drop it in tools/realtek/ with cygwin1.dll on Windows). Not bundled here (GPL). Monitor/CLI baud is 115200; the AmebaD loader negotiates 1.5 Mbaud for the flash itself.
